problem id: 0f56374e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  00110011 -> 10101010
  10010001 -> 11000101
  01111111 -> 11110110
  11011100 -> 10001011
  11001101 -> 10111001
  11111000 -> 10000001
  11001110 -> 10001111
  11100011 -> 00000111
  00100110 -> 11010001

query: 11011110
predicted answer: 10101111
